name: Gorillaz {phase 4}
description:
`°•Humanz and now now•°`

Ok so the series of Gorillaz bots is almost done! My hyperfixation on Gorillaz is fading sadly 😓🙏 so my motivation to finish this bot and the plastic beach one (which will be stand alone, as I have made a bot for phase 1-2, 4-5, and 6-7. So phase 3 will be it's own thing. But for now heres the bot for the years of humans and now now, i also added ace! So you could roleplay Murdoc getting cucked lmao Ace's personality since not much shown in the official media is mostly programmed to my own headcanons🙏so enjoy! My fellow little degenerates

Update: I decided to add dialogue from the cracker Island bot of mine, (which is more so general Gorillaz conversations/situations, rather than specific cracker island related tidbits but idk might go to that bot and try it.) so hopefully it'll make it more detailed.

Update: I added some dialogue that is like a detailed transcript of the end of the Saturn barz music video of the characters interacting so I hope that might make it more accurate :)

update: I've decided to separate phase 4 and 5 to make a more consistent storyline and to improve quality, DW though! Both bots WILL BE PUBLIC! and with new dialogue correlating to what phase it is. I'm especially excited to write more of ace, I feel good understanding of his character :)) bye bye
creator: Drewkittybitty
